fileRows.label: Unified blank input template
fileRows.use: copy this file before a real reviewer fills 22 P0 entries

fileRows.label: Unified blank validation report
fileRows.use: prove the unfilled template is blocked

fileRows.label: Fixture-only positive control
fileRows.use: prove validator mechanics only; never use as real review evidence

fileRows.label: Fixture-only validation report
fileRows.use: prove the validator can pass 22 filled fixture entries

fileRows.label: Write authorization preview
fileRows.use: confirm this handoff still does not authorize overlay writes

commandRows.hardStop: Stop if totalReviewEntries is not 22 or approval/release becomes true.

commandRows.expectedState: blank unified input remains 0 ready / 22 blocked
commandRows.hardStop: Stop if the blank input validates as ready.

commandRows.expectedState: fixture-only positive path remains 22 ready / 0 blocked
commandRows.hardStop: Stop if the fixture is treated as real reviewer input or approval.

commandRows.command: copy docs/LOCAL_COURSE_P0_HUMAN_REVIEW_BUNDLE_INPUT_COPY_TEMPLATE.json to a reviewer-owned filled input path
commandRows.expectedState: new copied file exists outside the generated template
commandRows.hardStop: Do not edit generated template in place.

commandRows.expectedState: only real reviewer-filled entries may become ready_for_overlay_apply
commandRows.hardStop: Stop if reviewer identity, reviewedAt, transcription/decision notes, or checklists are missing.

commandRows.expectedState: writeAllowedNow:false until explicit manual authorization and post-validation gates
commandRows.hardStop: Stop if preview is interpreted as write authorization.

reviewerRules: Use the unified input template copy, not the generated template in place.
Fill all 22 entries with real reviewerName and reviewedAt values.
Manual transcription entries require humanTranscription, humanSummary, public/source-fit notes, rewrite-boundary notes, and completed checklist.
Source replacement entries require selected decision, replacement path or unrecoverable marker, replacement note, rerun evidence, and completed checklist.
Do not paste private-course prose into learner-facing text.
Do not add stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, broker workflows, automation, or real-money guidance.
Do not treat fixture-only positive controls as real review evidence.
Do not write overlay changes until separate write authorization is explicit and machine gates pass.
completionRule: This handoff makes the unified P0 reviewer fill path operable. It does not complete real human review, does not approve learner-facing release, and does not authorize overlay writes.
boundary: P0 real reviewer handoff is reviewer-facing operations scaffolding only. It does not perform OCR, replace real reviewer judgment, approve learner-facing release, write overlay changes, provide stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, broker workflows, automation, or real-money guidance.
